---
layout: default
title: "Legislative Updates and Political Developments in India"
date: 2026-07-11T09:54:03.270219+00:00
summary: "Parliament passes transgender rights legislation while political tensions rise over Ram Mandir donations, election results, and state-level governance disputes"
run_time_ist: "3:24PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 3:24PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legislative and Electoral Outcomes:</strong> Parliament has passed the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026, while a constitutional amendment for women’s reservation in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies failed to pass. Additionally, the BJP&#x27;s Sanjay Bhatia and Congress&#x27;s Karamvir Singh Boudh have secured Rajya Sabha seats in Haryana.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxQU3ZPV0tBQ0k0Q2ZRTFZWZ1JVTjIyOWY4U2VVcEtUMzNURDBlSUdheU1TamkwWWZSQTczRXR2ZUttTUZkdnBJS2JhdFRQTmlIamtZZEpEQ2ROOVJISm9OSXhEYk84TmUyZUJOTHgzci1PaVFSeTlHMWpzQV9rOWEwWHNualRibzRieVJzSXNRY1ZDdVVsSGhGdEVFRjZXeEhoSnFkS2RnbUNpRFFfaFFiWEQwQUVSbGZiZW91ZFpnTjZOLVF0?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxNT3V5YWExT3MtWkhqcmVod3l0V3lGNWk0Y0J2ODNHdDJBbFFEQ1BXTEFsRTB4ZDJhbGZVWnp6cWRlSWgxekN2Njh5RkItYXh0azNnUWdQb0dOOE9TWGJ4a0dkOUViSWVJTGh0akU5X2QtWEZrc3NaV1VENlQzVGlzQ2NFNVc4VjNXVDdhM1BPdjhEWFQyRmppZF9uQzBibTE3bWE4cWhlem5kRGM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Ram Mandir Controversy:</strong> The Congress party is demanding a Supreme Court-monitored investigation into alleged donation thefts at the Ram Mandir, amid broader political scrutiny regarding the project&#x27;s financial transparency and accountability.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxPcGtMX3R3Y3FqUnc4a0tvamJTS0N1RGhhNkRlVENBcnNzVGppZUZ1MWMwY3NEX2psbVAwYWEzUW54OC1mUGphM1d4NkJseGJtWjd1N1NqSEVQbkM0OXZMQ2RMdHh6MkpBOFdscHQ0OURUelpCbnltUUNzZG84Y2U2T3E1amVrZ0VOdHIwN0labHAtSTZSOVJZaFRJRmRncEFVSFE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Alliance and State Politics:</strong> The TVK has allocated a Rajya Sabha seat to the Congress in Tamil Nadu, while the Bengal government has formed a committee led by a former Supreme Court judge to review a draft Uniform Civil Code bill.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPQmZsWTRmdHROeFVNMHNlcFUtcl9naEY3YW4zOV9teHVOc0FYVDNSZzFHZFRoeUJJSzdKSl9EbFJoclFjNnhrMGktWTZEcFYwRzBjbDNVbTNFd0ctWkdreDNRclR4Y0s4ekh4SlNPMnhSTUxIS0tuR3dCUXh2TGN0SVlJR2RETExCVjFkREZHMVItV2lKaUdXRUVBSm96ZVU?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Political Allegations and Governance:</strong> Tensions persist as CM Omar Abdullah alleges the BJP attempted to induce defections among National Conference MLAs, and the BJP has dismissed Congress accusations regarding the Union Home Minister&#x27;s involvement in FCRA matters as politically motivated.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W8</a></span></li>
</ul>
